title: "Be Patient Toward All Men" I Thessalonians 5:14

notes.introduction: An exposition of 1 Thessalonians 5:14 on the command to be patient toward all men, the seventh installment in a series on closing instructions to the Thessalonian church. The sermon treats patience as a fruit of the Spirit requiring Spirit-filled living rather than natural human effort.

sections.heading: Review of Prior Commands in the Verse
